personas.name: The Global Traveler
personas.summary: Frequent traveler who sees Louis Vuitton as part of travel ritual — luggage, SLGs, and bags that signal taste without needing explanation. She values heritage storytelling and practical durability.
personas.shopping_behavior: Often starts with leather goods or travel. Responds to occasion-based framing (work trip, weekend). Asks about care, personalization, and longevity.
personas.trend_receptivity: Travel trunk narratives, new canvas/leather hybrids, seasonal collaborations, airport and street style moments
personas.avoid: Anything that feels flimsy, purely decorative, or disconnected from real use

personas.name: The Power Dresser
personas.summary: Senior executive or founder who uses Louis Vuitton to signal authority with polish. Invests in recognizable icons and clean tailoring; wants efficiency and credibility.
personas.shopping_behavior: Efficiency-driven; builds a working wardrobe. Responds to outfit-building and occasion framing.
personas.trend_receptivity: Versatile investment pieces, work-appropriate silhouettes, wardrobe anchors, quality narratives
personas.avoid: Overly fashion-forward pieces that read informal for her role

personas.name: The Savvy Collector
personas.summary: Fashion-literate client who follows runway, drops, and resale. She researches before visiting and wants peer-level conversation about design codes and collaborations.
personas.shopping_behavior: Highly researched; often starts with bags or sneakers. Wants the CA to match her depth, not retail basics.
personas.trend_receptivity: Collaborations, runway-to-retail pieces, hype drops with editorial context
personas.avoid: Generic luxury framing, talking down to her knowledge level

personas.name: The First Aspirational Buyer
personas.summary: Earlier-career client saving for a first major piece — often a small leather good or entry bag. Motivated by milestones and social proof but wants guidance, not pressure.
personas.shopping_behavior: Longer consideration; asks about price steps, care, and what to buy first. Influenced by XHS and celebrity.
personas.trend_receptivity: Entry icons, gifting, seasonal color stories, celebrity styling
personas.avoid: Snobbery, pushing pieces far above her budget without alternatives
